text_original: I downloaded this app back in August last year and I've been enjoying the roleplaying it's got great descriptions and so many characters to choose from, plus it allows my creative mind to come out and play. P.S. It's worth the download and yearly subscription.
text_zh: 我是在去年八月下载这个应用的，一直很享受其中的角色扮演。它有着极佳的描述，还有超多角色可供选择，而且它能让我的创造力尽情释放。P.S. 这款应用绝对值得下载和订阅年费。
reply_original: Wow, thank you so much for being with us since last August! Hearing how Fantasia helps unleash your creative mind is the best reward we could ask for. We are thrilled that you love the characters and descriptions, and we truly appreciate your support with the yearly subscription. We promise to keep making your journeys magical!
reply_zh: 哇，非常感谢你自去年八月以来一直陪伴着我们！听到 Fantasia 能够帮你释放创意灵感，对我们来说就是最好的回报。看到你喜欢这些角色和描述，我们感到无比欣喜，也非常感谢你订阅年费会员来支持我们。我们保证会继续让你的旅程充满奇妙的魔法！
